description: Test whether GELU is necessary at all with the optimal 4-tap configuration. Previous results show gelu=[5], gelu=[6], and gelu=[7] each achieve 0.8426 individually at similar angles. This confirms GELU may be redundant. Testing with no GELU will either: (1) reveal 0.8426 is achievable without any GELU activation (significant efficiency gain), or (2) show GELU is essential, enabling us to conclusively adopt the minimal single-level variant.
